args: if [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/brainhub/venv/bin/brainhub" ]; then exec "$HOME/.local/share/brainhub/venv/bin/brainhub" mcp; elif command -v brainhub >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec brainhub mcp; else echo 'Brain Hub runtime is missing. Run make install-plugin-runtime from the Brain Hub repository.' >&2; exit 127; fi
